localServicesDatabase.title: Sewa Setu Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Currently, there are 800 plus services under Sewa Setu with timebound and transparent delivery.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Permanent residents and citizens living in Assam.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Varies from ₹10 to ₹30 depending on the specific certificate or citizen service applied for.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card, Voter ID), Permanent Resident Certificate (PRC), Address Proof, Active Mobile Number
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Click 'Official Site' to launch Sewa Setu.
2. Register or Login using your mobile number via OTP.
3. Select the required department service.
4. Fill the online form, upload soft copies of documents, and submit.

localServicesDatabase.title: EODB Assam
localServicesDatabase.desc: EODB looks at domestic small & medium-size companies, measures the regulations applying to them through their life cycle.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Entrepreneurs, Industrialists, and Business owners operating within Assam.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Statutory Government licensing and clearance fees applicable based on the business category.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Business Registration Certificate / MoA, Business PAN Card, Land Ownership or Lease Agreement Documents, Proprietor Identification
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Go to the Single Window Agency platform.
2. Register a new investor profile on the portal.
3. Apply for the specific industrial clearances or NOCs.
4. Pay the statutory fee online and track your license status.

localServicesDatabase.title: Sadbhavana Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: An initiative of the Government of Assam to expedite disposal of files covering all DC offices, Directorates and Commissionerates.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Any citizen who has a long-pending application or untracked file in the state departments.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost (Public grievance acceleration initiative).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Previous Application Reference Number, Copy of the originally submitted letter or file, Government ID Proof
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the Sadbhavana tracking portal.
2. Input your old file registration or reference tracking number.
3. Provide a brief description of the pending grievance.
4. Submit the tracking request to route it directly to the cell.

localServicesDatabase.title: Mission Basundhara
localServicesDatabase.desc: Mission mode accelerated disposal of citizen services related to land revenue, mutations, and records.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Landowners and legal heirs seeking land mutations, settlement, or re-classification in Assam.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Standard nominal land mutation, partition mapping, and processing charges.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Old Land Revenue Receipts (Khajana), Historical Jamabandi copy, Legal Heir Certificate (for inheritance mutation), Land Sale Deed
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the official Mission Basundhara portal.
2. Choose the specific land service (e.g., Mutation or Partition).
3. Authenticate with OTP and input Dag and Patta numbers carefully.
4. Upload your legacy land deeds and finalize the submission.

localServicesDatabase.title: Kritagyata Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Online Pension Sanction & Payment Tracking System for online tracking of pension sanction and payment process.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Retired or retiring Government employees of the State Government of Assam.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost for all state government retirees.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Service Book Records, Pension Papers (Form 1 & Form 2), Bank Account Details (Joint Passbook copy), Passport size photos, Descriptive Roll
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Head to the Kritagyata Pension desk.
2. Log in using the system credentials provided by your DDO.
3. Fill out the digitized pension forms securely.
4. Scan and upload the recommended service sheets before routing to the Audit department.

localServicesDatabase.title: Assam Tenders
localServicesDatabase.desc: Tenders Assam enables Tenderers to download the Tender Schedule free of cost and then submit the bids online.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Registered Contractors, Firms, Vendors, and Corporate Bidders.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Tender schedule download is free, but Tender Processing Fees and EMD (Earnest Money Deposit) apply per bid.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Valid Contractor Registration/Enlistment, GST Registration Certificate, Firm PAN, Digital Signature Certificate (Class III DSC), Income Tax Returns
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Insert your Class-3 DSC and access the Assam Tenders portal.
2. Search for active procurement contracts using department IDs.
3. Download the technical specs and BOQ excel sheets.
4. Encrypt documents, pay processing fees online, upload bids, and submit before the closing date.

localServicesDatabase.title: Dharitree - ILRMS
localServicesDatabase.desc: Integrated Land Records Management System to check Jamabandi, land valuation, and maps online.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Public access portal open to anyone verifying land ownership or maps in Assam.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Online viewing is free. Certified structural prints carry a nominal fee.
localServicesDatabase.documents: No documents needed for general search. Knowledge of District, Circle, and Village/Mauza name is required.
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Access the Integrated Land Records portal (ILRMS).
2. Choose your District, Revenue Circle, and Village name from dropdowns.
3. Search by Dag Number, Patta Number, or Pattadar Name.
4. Review the online Jamabandi ledger copy or land map on screen.

localServicesDatabase.title: e-Office 7.X Training Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Official training portal and modules for Andhra Pradesh e-Office 7.X implementation.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Andhra Pradesh state government employees, department officials, and designated staff.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost for government personnel.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Government Employee ID, HRMS / CFMS credentials, Official Email ID
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Click 'Official Site' to access the AP e-Office desk.
2. Log in using your designated employee credentials.
3. Navigate to the Learning Management / Training section.
4. Access video modules and downloadable manuals step-by-step.

localServicesDatabase.title: eOffice User Manual
localServicesDatabase.desc: Step-by-step user guide and manual for navigating state e-Office operations.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Public access for review, primarily targeted at AP Government department handlers.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Free to view and download.
localServicesDatabase.documents: No documents required to view or download the documentation files.
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the portal via the official link.
2. Look for the 'User Manuals / Downloads' section.
3. Select the version matching your system (e.g., v7.X).
4. Click the PDF link to read or save the reference guide directly.

localServicesDatabase.title: e-Office Pre-Requisites
localServicesDatabase.desc: System requirements, browser setup, and software tools needed for AP e-Office access.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: IT administrators, system operators, and employees setting up digital office infrastructure.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Free system configuration utility checklist.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Operating System details (Windows/Linux), Current Java environment status, Browser version specs
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the Pre-requisites resource page.
2. Run the system diagnostic tools listed on the screen.
3. Download mandatory Java runtime or custom helper patches.
4. Adjust security settings in your web browser as directed.

localServicesDatabase.title: eOffice DSC Services 7.0.2
localServicesDatabase.desc: Digital Signature Certificate (DSC) drivers, setup, and troubleshooting utility for AP eOffice.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Gazetted officers, signing authorities, and clearing staff using hardware tokens.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Drivers are free to download; hardware token procurement charges apply as per CCA norms.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Valid Class 3 Digital Signature Certificate USB Token, System Admin Access
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Access the eOffice DSC services download utility.
2. Download the version 7.0.2 driver matching your OS.
3. Run the installer files with administrator rights.
4. Insert your USB token and test the cryptographic framework via the browser.

localServicesDatabase.title: Public Grievance Redressal System (PGRS)
localServicesDatabase.desc: Spandana / Public Grievance portal to register and track complaints online directly with AP Govt.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Any citizen of Andhra Pradesh having a grievance or complaint regarding state government services.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Aadhaar Card Number, Active Mobile Number, Supporting documents/evidence related to the grievance
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Visit the Spandana PGRS portal.
2. Authenticate using your Aadhaar number and OTP.
3. Select the target department and fill out the detailed grievance form.
4. Upload proof files, submit, and note down the generated grievance ID.

localServicesDatabase.title: State Services - Forms For Public
localServicesDatabase.desc: Downloadable official application forms for various Andhra Pradesh state departments.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Open public portal for any citizen requiring offline/physical government application forms.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Downloading form sheets is free of cost.
localServicesDatabase.documents: No documents needed for downloading. Specific submission requires documents noted on the forms.
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Head over to the primary AP state portal services page.
2. Browse through the department-wise directory list.
3. Locate the targeted application form layout.
4. Click the file icon to save and print the PDF page.

localServicesDatabase.title: State Services - GSWS Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Grama Sachivalayam & Ward Sachivalayam citizen service portal for hyper-local delivery.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Rural and urban citizens seeking hyper-local grassroots level welfare delivery and monitoring.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Free registration; transaction fees vary by specific service rendered.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Aadhaar Card, Residence proof mapping to local Secretariat ward, Mobile Number
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Visit the dynamic GSWS framework portal.
2. Track volunteer mapping or log in via citizen portal options.
3. Search for the local welfare scheme or public status database.
4. Apply directly or track applications submitted through physical secretariats.

localServicesDatabase.title: Change of Name Service
localServicesDatabase.desc: Official gazette notification application service for legal name change in Andhra Pradesh.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Adult citizens or legal guardians seeking a formal name modification in the official State Gazette.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Standard processing and printing charges apply as per publication parameters.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Signed Affidavit from a notary public, Newspaper clipping announcing name change, Identity Proof, Passport photo
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the gazette publication application dashboard.
2. Fill in your old name, new name, and background information.
3. Upload copies of your affidavit and newspaper clips.
4. Remit the publication processing fee online and wait for digital issuance.

localServicesDatabase.title: MeeSeva Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Online citizen services portal for applying certificates like Caste, Income, and Residence.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Citizens residing in Andhra Pradesh requiring verified legal certificates and licenses.
localServicesDatabase.fees: User charges vary per service (typically between ₹35 to ₹60 plus statutory certificate fee).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Aadhaar Card, Ration Card, Income certificates/Payslips (for Income cert), Property Tax documents (for Residence cert)
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the MeeSeva Portal and select 'Citizen Login'.
2. Register your unique user account and authenticate.
3. Select the certificate format you wish to generate.
4. Complete the entry form, attach standard enclosures, and settle the payment.

localServicesDatabase.title: MeeBhoomi (Land Records)
localServicesDatabase.desc: Official land records portal to view Adangal, 1-B, and village maps of Andhra Pradesh.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Open search access for land buyers, agriculture farmers, and property legal auditors.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Online verification and viewing data is entirely free. Digital certified prints carry a nominal cost.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Knowledge of Account Number, Survey Number, Aadhaar Card link parameters, Zone/Village coordinates
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the MeeBhoomi web desk application.
2. Select 'Your Adangal' or '1-B Ledger' options from menu choices.
3. Choose the District, Mandal, and Village identifiers.
4. Query via survey code to fetch and examine digital land record ledgers.

localServicesDatabase.title: AP Transport Department
localServicesDatabase.desc: Online portal for Driving License, Vehicle Registration, and booking slots for RTA services.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Vehicle owners and operators seeking driver training slots, licensing, or registration utilities.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Varies extensively by specific RTA function (DL test fees, fitness checks, or permit costs).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Age Proof (School certificate), Address Proof, Vehicle Invoice / Insurance Policy papers, Learner License copy (for permanent DL)
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Navigate to the main AP Transport RTA window.
2. Choose the category (Driving License / Registration services).
3. Supply the basic user profiles and current index inputs.
4. Block your local test slots, process online fee clears, and save the generation slips.

localServicesDatabase.title: Real-Time Governance Society
localServicesDatabase.desc: Apex body for real-time governance, data analytics, and monitoring state-wide services.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Data reviewers, policy monitors, and citizens assessing state metrics and weather notifications.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Public monitoring metrics desk is completely free to interact with.
localServicesDatabase.documents: No documentation records required for basic interaction dashboards.
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Launch the Real-Time Governance Society central hub portal.
2. Scan through current project trackers or dashboard analysis panels.
3. Explore performance trackers or regional grievance analytics charts.
4. Access the public announcement data desk for emergency updates.

localServicesDatabase.title: eProcurement System Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Official portal for government tenders, digital bidding process, contracts & departmental procurement.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Registered Contractors, Government Vendors, Firms, and Certified Bidders.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Portal enrollment is free; specific Bid Document Fees and EMD (Earnest Money Deposit) apply per tender.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Valid Class 3 Digital Signature Certificate (DSC), Company Registration, GSTIN Certificate, Firm PAN, Income Tax Returns (ITR)
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Connect your Class 3 DSC token and open the portal.
2. Register a secure bidder profile online.
3. Search for active tenders by department or region.
4. Download the technical sheets/BOQ, encrypt your documents, pay the fee online, and submit your bid.

localServicesDatabase.title: APSTS Bus Services
localServicesDatabase.desc: Official Arunachal Pradesh State Transport booking, inter-state routes & bus schedule tracking.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Open to all general public, tourists, and commuters traveling within or across Arunachal Pradesh borders.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Standard bus ticket fare based on the chosen route, distance, and bus type (Ordinary/Super/AC).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Valid Government ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID) required during journey boarding, Passenger Mobile Number
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the official APSTS ticket booking desk.
2. Choose your origin station, destination, and select date of journey.
3. Select your preferred bus schedule and specific available seats.
4. Provide passenger details, clear the payment gateway, and download the SMS/E-Ticket.

localServicesDatabase.title: Arunachal e-Service Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Single-window portal for applying Scheduled Tribe (ST), Permanent Residence (PRC) & Income certificates.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Permanent residents and indigenous tribes belonging to the state of Arunachal Pradesh.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Nominal statutory service fee ranging from ₹20 to ₹50 based on the specific certificate type.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card), Local Land Records / Land Possession Certificate (LPC), Parents' ST/PRC Certificate (for lineage), Passport size photo
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Launch the single-window e-Service portal desk.
2. Complete the initial registration and set up citizen user credentials.
3. Pick the targeted service (e.g., ST Certificate or PRC) from the menu options.
4. Fill the comprehensive data fields, attach soft copies of documents, pay the fee, and submit.

localServicesDatabase.title: e-ILP System Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Apply online for Inner Line Permits (ILP) required for domestic tourists and working professionals.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Domestic tourists, working professionals, and non-residents visiting or working in Arunachal Pradesh.
localServicesDatabase.fees: ₹100 for Single/Group E-ILP (Tourist Permit) and ₹400 for Employment/Employment Group Permit.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Valid Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card, Passport, Voter ID, Driving License), Recent passport size photograph, Local Sponsor details (for employment visa)
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Access the digital e-ILP service framework window.
2. Select the category type matching your visit parameters (Tourist / Employment).
3. Complete applicant information fields and input travel date ranges.
4. Attach clear photograph and ID files, make payment online, and download the digital Inner Line Permit barcode.

localServicesDatabase.title: Electricity Bill Payment
localServicesDatabase.desc: Department of Power online bill generation, consumer account ledger & digital payment gateway.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Registered power consumers (Domestic, Commercial, or Industrial) under the Department of Power, Arunachal Pradesh.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Free to check history; variable charge based on your monthly unit consumption/billing matrix.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Unique Consumer Account Number / Bill Reference Identifier
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Navigate to the utility quick pay section.
2. Type in your Consumer ID number to pull up the current pending invoice data.
3. Review the current cycle readings, due date parameters, and outstanding balances.
4. Choose a digital payment avenue (UPI, NetBanking, Debit/Credit Card) and execute transaction.

localServicesDatabase.title: EGPF Portal (Provident Fund)
localServicesDatabase.desc: State Government Employees Provident Fund balance check, statement download & claim tracking.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Active and retired state government employees enrolled under the Arunachal Pradesh GPF rules.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost for all authorized state department staff.
localServicesDatabase.documents: GPF Account Number, Registered Employee Mobile Number, Department DDO Code
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Go to the centralized EGPF workspace engine.
2. Supply your specific GPF code series along with your secure password credentials.
3. Authenticate using the dynamic mobile OTP grid.
4. Browse your dashboard layout to examine active balances, track claim statuses, or retrieve year-wise ledgers.

localServicesDatabase.title: APSSB Recruitment Board
localServicesDatabase.desc: Arunachal Pradesh Staff Selection Board official site for Group C vacancies, admit cards & results.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Job seekers meeting designated age parameters and educational specifications listed for state Group C slots.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Application exam processing fee ranging from ₹150 to ₹250 (Concessions applicable for APST applicants).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Educational Marksheets/Certificates, Category/ST Certificate (if applicable), Passport size image file, Signature scan copy
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the APSSB central board recruitment dashboard.
2. Select active vacancy announcements and hit the 'Apply Online' toggle link.
3. Input personal details, verify credentials, and fill structural education indexes.
4. Upload the files, submit the processing fee online, and secure a physical download of the receipt.

localServicesDatabase.title: APCS Public Commission
localServicesDatabase.desc: State Civil Services examinations, Combined Competitive Exams, syllabus and official notifications.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Graduates holding a bachelor's degree from a recognized institution and matching structural age criteria.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Examination/Application processing costs apply as per specific competitive advertisement releases.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Degree Convocation / Graduation Certificate, Matriculation Age Proof sheet, Caste/Tribe certificate, Digital passport print
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Head to the APPSC recruitment management desk.
2. Complete the comprehensive One-Time Registration (OTR) profile accurately.
3. Pick the target competitive exam selection from open vacancies.
4. Complete standard enclosures layout, satisfy fee metrics, and lock application sheets.

localServicesDatabase.title: CMAAY Health Insurance
localServicesDatabase.desc: Chief Minister Arogya Arunachal Yojana for cashless hospital treatment up to ₹5 Lakhs per family.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: All indigenous families (APST) of Arunachal Pradesh and non-APST state government employees.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Enrolment and card generation are completely free for all eligible family units.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Aadhaar Card copy for all family units, APST Certificate / Legal Resident proof, Government Employee ID (for state workers)
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Launch the dedicated CMAAY portal desk application.
2. Click on the register option link and pass family Aadhaar numbers.
3. Match data items and declare relationship fields across the structure grid.
4. Finalize registration step to process, review, and print your digital CMAAY cashless healthcare card.

localServicesDatabase.title: GeM & Commerce Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Government e-Marketplace vendor onboarding, trade registration and commerce department circulars.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Manufacturers, Local Artisans, MSME Units, Service Providers, and Business Merchants.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Portal onboarding and marketplace creation setup are free of cost.
localServicesDatabase.documents: PAN Card (Individual/Company), Aadhaar Card details, Bank Account details, Udyam Registration (for MSMEs), IT Returns
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Connect your active system parameters and open the GeM trading grid portal.
2. Initiate vendor account validation using PAN data details.
3. Declare vendor structures, verify banking profiles, and insert active store inventory catalogs.
4. Take part in state-wide procurement tenders or handle direct purchase requests seamlessly.

localServicesDatabase.title: CM Jansunwai Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Direct Public Grievance Redressal Portal to submit issues directly to the Chief Minister's Office.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Any citizen of Arunachal Pradesh seeking administrative review or raising general public department complaints.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost (Public governance portal).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Active Mobile Number, Relevant application context papers / proof files supporting the grievance
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Go to the official CM Jansunwai grievance portal page.
2. Enter your phone contact number to secure a verification pin code via SMS.
3. Pick the targeted government cell department and describe the core issue context explicitly.
4. Upload relevant support file parameters, click submit, and track resolution progress via the token number.

localServicesDatabase.title: CPGRAMS National Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Centralized Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System for State and Central schemes.

localServicesDatabase.title: Caste Certificate (जाति प्रमाण पत्र)
localServicesDatabase.desc: Official service on ServicePlus / RTPS Bihar portal to apply, track, and download SC, ST, and OBC certificates online.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Citizens permanently residing in Bihar belonging to recognized SC, ST, EBC, or BC categories.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost (₹0) on the official RTPS portal.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Aadhaar Card, Self-Declaration Form, Ration Card, Copy of Father's Caste Certificate (for lineage proof), Passport size photo
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the RTPS Bihar/ServicePlus portal.
2. Select 'Apply Online' and choose Issuance of Caste Certificate.
3. Fill in personal details and select your specific caste category.
4. Upload the required documents, verify with Aadhaar OTP or submit, and download the acknowledgement receipt.

localServicesDatabase.title: Income Certificate (आय प्रमाण पत्र)
localServicesDatabase.desc: Apply online for the official annual family income certificate required for student scholarships, fee waivers, and state welfare benefits.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Any resident citizen or family earning an income within the state of Bihar.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost (₹0).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card/Voter ID), Salary Slips (if employed), Affidavit regarding agricultural/business income sources, Passport size photo
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Go to the ServicePlus Bihar website.
2. Navigate to General Administration Department services and select Income Certificate.
3. Fill out the application form declaring accurate income figures from all sources.
4. Upload your ID proof, verify the application, and submit.

localServicesDatabase.title: Residential/Domicile Certificate (निवास प्रमाण पत्र)
localServicesDatabase.desc: Apply for permanent or temporary state residence proof required for educational institutional admissions and Bihar government recruitment programs.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Individuals who are permanent residents or have a fixed domicile address in Bihar.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost (₹0).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, Recent Land Revenue Receipt (Malguzari) or Electricity Bill, Passport size photograph
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Navigate to the RTPS Bihar online dashboard.
2. Choose the Domicile/Residential Certificate option from the service list.
3. Enter your complete permanent address details along with police station and ward number.
4. Attach the address verification documents and complete the submission grid.

localServicesDatabase.title: Caste Certificate (जाति प्रमाण पत्र)
localServicesDatabase.desc: Apply online for official Scheduled Caste, Scheduled Tribe, or OBC certificates for reservation benefits in education and state government jobs.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Students and job seekers originating from Bihar who qualify for reservation matrices.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost (₹0).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Aadhaar Card, Land ownership record showing lineage, Father's caste declaration certificate, Recent passport photograph
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Access the RTPS single-window platform.
2. Navigate to the dynamic caste application module.
3. Supply your structural details and lineage data items.
4. Upload the files, verify via text OTP, and save the acknowledgement token for tracking status.

localServicesDatabase.title: Non-Creamy Layer (NCL) Certificate
localServicesDatabase.desc: Official online portal application for securing central or state format NCL certification for reservation benefits in government jobs and educational fields.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: OBC/BC/EBC applicants whose annual family income is below the threshold limit (currently ₹8 Lakhs).
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free of Cost (₹0).
localServicesDatabase.documents: Already issued Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, and Residential Certificate (Three Mandatory Certs), Affidavit of Non-Creamy Layer status, Aadhaar Card
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Ensure you have active Caste, Income, and Residential certificates ready.
2. Log into the ServicePlus Bihar portal.
3. Select 'Issuance of Non-Creamy Layer Certificate' (State or Central format).
4. Upload the three prerequisite certificates along with the NCL affidavit form and submit.

localServicesDatabase.title: Bhumi Jankari - Land Records
localServicesDatabase.desc: Check online Bihar land registration details, view certified sale deeds, explore Jamabandi registers, and internal mutation records dashboard.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Open public access portal for landowners, buyers, and legal property title verifiers.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Online searching, viewing Jamabandi, and mutation status tracking are completely free.
localServicesDatabase.documents: No documents needed for general search. Knowing District, Circle, Mauza, Survey/Khata/Khesra number is required.
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Open the official Bihar Bhumi portal.
2. Select 'View Jamabandi Register' or 'Check Mutation Status' on the home grid.
3. Choose your District, Circle, and Mauza from the cascading dropdown lists.
4. Search using the Khata number or Owner name to display records instantly.

localServicesDatabase.title: Land Possession Certificate (LPC)
localServicesDatabase.desc: Apply online for Land Possession Certificate (LPC) via Bihar Bhumi portal, mandatory for agricultural bank loans and crop insurance verification.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Registered landowners in Bihar who have an updated, clear Jamabandi record (up-to-date tax paid).
localServicesDatabase.fees: Processing application is free on the official web portal.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Latest Land Revenue/Tax Receipt (Lagaan Rasid), Khata/Khesra land ledger papers, Self-Declaration Form for LPC
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Navigate to the Bihar Bhumi portal and log in using your user credentials.
2. Click on 'Apply New LPC' tab.
3. Select your land parameters via District, Circle, and Mauza coordinates.
4. Choose your updated Jamabandi row, attach the latest tax receipt file, fill out the declaration text, and submit.

localServicesDatabase.title: Bihar eProcurement System
localServicesDatabase.desc: Official central management tracking portal for commercial state tenders, dynamic corporate bidding cycles, and multi-department vendor listings.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Registered corporate firms, engineering contractors, service providers, and empanelled commercial vendors.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Tender downloading might be free, but specific Earnest Money Deposits (EMD) and portal processing fees apply per bid.
localServicesDatabase.documents: Class 3 Digital Signature Certificate (DSC), Valid Contractor Registration, GSTIN Profile, Company PAN, Income Tax Returns (ITR)
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Connect your Class-3 DSC token to your computer system interface.
2. Open the eProc2 Bihar portal workspace.
3. Search for open bidding calls released by targeted departments.
4. Complete the item financial spreadsheets (BOQ), encrypt data files, clear payment metrics, and submit your proposal bundle.

localServicesDatabase.title: MNSSBY Student Credit Card
localServicesDatabase.desc: Official Mukhyamantri Nischay Swayam Sahayata Bhatta Yojana portal for student credit cards, education loans, and self-help allowances.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Students native to Bihar who have cleared 12th standard exams and are pursuing higher education degrees.
localServicesDatabase.fees: Zero application processing fee. Loan interest rates are highly subsidized (1% for women/disabled, 4% for others).
localServicesDatabase.documents: 10th and 12th Marksheets, Admission Proof/Letter from recognized college, Fee Structure document, Income Certificate, Resident Proof, PAN Cards of student and co-applicant
localServicesDatabase.steps:
1. Register on the MNSSBY 7-Nishchay student mission web portal.
2. Fill in personal profile variables and choose 'Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme'.
3. Complete the financial form layout, provide college parameters, and click submit online.
4. Book a slot to visit the local District Registration and Counseling Center (DRCC) with original physical sheets for verification.

localServicesDatabase.title: e-Labharthi Portal
localServicesDatabase.desc: Track and monitor direct benefit transfers (DBT), old-age pensions, disability benefits, and verification status for social security schemes.
localServicesDatabase.eligibility: Beneficiaries enrolled under Bihar state social security schemes (Old-age, Laxmi Bai Social Security, Disability pension models).
localServicesDatabase.fees: Completely Free utility for citizen validation tracking.
